name: Jinbe (Reprint)
effect_text: [Blocker] (After your opponent declares an attack, you may rest this card to make it the new target of the attack.)[Opponent's Turn] If you have 10 DON!! cards on your field, this Character gains +1000 power.DISCLAIMER: This card is a reprint of the pre-existing card in the OP05 set.
